steps.title: Expand and write in standard form
steps.content:
Expand the left side: $x(x - 15) = 34$ becomes $x^2 - 15x = 34$.
Move all terms to one side: $x^2 - 15x - 34 = 0$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to $-34$ and add to $-15$.
These are $-17$ and $2$: check $(-17)(2) = -34$ ✓ and $-17 + 2 = -15$ ✓
Factor: $(x - 17)(x + 2) = 0$
Solve: $x = 17$ or $x = -2$. The positive solution is 17.
